title: GPT-5.4 mini and nano shipped across API, ChatGPT, and Codex
summary: GPT-5.4 mini and nano shipped across API, ChatGPT, and Codex : OpenAI launched GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano , positioning them as its most capable small models yet. Per @OpenAIDevs , GPT-5.4 mini is more than 2x faster than GPT-5 mini, targets coding, computer use, multimodal understanding, and subagents , and offers a 400k context window in the API. OpenAI also claims mini approaches larger GPT-5.4 performance on evaluations including SWE-Bench Pro and OSWorld-Verified , while using only 30% of GPT-5.4 Codex q...

metadata.subtopic: OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 Mini/Nano Release and the Shift to Small, Coding-Optimized Models

title: Subagents and secure execution are now first-class product features across the ecosystem
summary: Subagents and secure execution are now first-class product features across the ecosystem : OpenAI’s Codex now supports subagents , and GPT-5.4 mini was framed by OpenAI as especially good for that use case. Hermes Agent’s v0.3.0 release is another strong signal: 248 PRs in 5 days , first-class plugin architecture , live Chrome control via CDP , IDE integrations, local Whisper-based voice mode, PII redaction, and provider integrations like Browser Use . The resulting direction is consistent across vendors: agent...

metadata.subtopic: Agent Infrastructure: Sandboxes, Subagents, Open SWE, and the Harness Wars

title: Mamba-3 strengthens the case for inference-first hybrid architectures
summary: Mamba-3 strengthens the case for inference-first hybrid architectures : The other major architecture release was Mamba-3 , presented by @_albertgu and @tri_dao as the latest step in making linear/state-space models more competitive in the hybrid era. The emphasis is explicitly on inference efficiency , not replacing transformers outright. Together summarized it as a MIMO variant that improves model strength at similar decode speed, with claims of strongest performance among linear models and fastest prefill+deco...

metadata.subtopic: Architecture Research: Attention Residuals, Vertical Attention, and Mamba-3

title: Open and enterprise agent tooling dominated side announcements
summary: Open and enterprise agent tooling dominated side announcements : H Company released Holotron-12B , an open multimodal model built with NVIDIA for computer-use agents . Perplexity announced Comet Enterprise , bringing its AI browser to enterprise teams with rollout controls and CrowdStrike Falcon integration . NVIDIA’s broader business thesis also got amplified: @TheTuringPost highlighted Jensen’s remark that the often-cited $1T AI infra opportunity only covers a subset of the stack through 2027, reinforcing that...

metadata.subtopic: GTC: NVIDIA’s Agent Push, Open Models, and the Infrastructure Thesis

title: Local/private agent workflows keep improving
summary: Local/private agent workflows keep improving : Hugging Face shipped an hf CLI extension that auto-detects the best local model/quant for available hardware and spins up a local coding agent. Unsloth launched Unsloth Studio , an open-source web UI to train and run 500+ models locally across Mac/Windows/Linux, with claims of 2x faster training using 70% less VRAM , GGUF support, synthetic data tooling, tool calling, and code execution. Ollama added web search/fetch plugins and headless launch support for OpenClaw...
